name: Awesome React Components
description: Curated list of React components and component libraries.
summary: Useful as a discovery layer for React UI building blocks, component libraries, and design-system references.
useCases: Compare UI building blocks before adopting one.
Use as a reference for design-system exploration.

maintenance.notes: Best treated as a discovery surface rather than a runtime dependency.

risk.notes: The value is curation, not direct code reuse.
